entities.name: BEET ARMYWORM
entities.description: The insect pest Spodoptera exigua studied for its survival and development under varying environmental conditions

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental temperature varied between 15C and 45C to observe its impact on the insect

entities.name: CO2
entities.description: Carbon dioxide concentrations varied between 350 and 750 ppm to observe its impact on the insect

entities.name: RELATIVE HUMIDITY
entities.description: Environmental moisture levels varied between 55% and 85% to observe its impact on the insect

entities.name: SURVIVAL
entities.description: The ability of the beet armyworm to survive through various life stages

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and maturation process of the beet armyworm

entities.name: LARVAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the beet armyworm during its larval stage

entities.name: PUPAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the beet armyworm during its pupal stage

entities.name: LARVAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the larval stage of the beet armyworm

entities.name: PUPAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the pupal stage of the beet armyworm

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The rate and success of adults emerging from the pupal stage

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The number of eggs produced per female beet armyworm

entities.name: EGG VIABILITY
entities.description: The percentage of eggs that are capable of hatching

entities.name: CONTROLLED GROWTH CHAMBER
entities.description: The experimental environment used to regulate temperature, CO2, and humidity

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in global or regional climate patterns affecting pests

entities.name: POPULATION DYNAMICS
entities.description: The changes in the size and composition of the insect pest population over time

entities.name: CROP LOSSES
entities.description: The reduction in agricultural yield caused by insect pests

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY OF CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The ability to maintain crop production levels over the long term
